items.title_original: Passkeys in Symfony 7.4: How to Build a Completely Passwordless Future
items.title_neutral: Passkeys in Symfony 7.4: How to Build a Completely Passwordless Future
items.excerpt: Passkeys replace traditional passwords with cryptographic key pairs. Your device stores a private key, while the server only ever sees the public key. No fallback, no “reset password” links. Just pure, secure, biometric-backed passkeys.
